_verdict.claim: neither GPU nor CPU >=1.2x plan wall-clock -> 2-stage adds launches, vectorized qnet not the wall-clock bottleneck
_verdict.note: cheap-rank=distilled scalar MLP (best case). elite stubbed (timing only). config: 512 samples, 6 iter, H3, 64 elites, num_q5(avg=2 subsampled), latent512.
